title: Emergency Help -
text_excerpt: Emergency Help - Skip to main content Join Donate Home About Contact Emergency Help Office Open Hours Help from Peter Work Experience What can’t we help with? News Events My Work Science, Innovation and Technology Future of Work and Employment Domestic Abuse in Family Courts Trains Our NHS Homelessness Patient Transport School Funding BEIS Committee Fighting Climate Change Police Funding Donate More Menu Emergency Help You can often get immediate help from these contacts; In an emergency always call 999 Police non-emergency service : 101 NHS medical help : 111 or https://111.nhs.uk/ Council Website and Switchboard : https://www.brighton-hove.gov.uk/ or 01273 29 00 00 ACAS (for National Minimum Wage, working hours and employment agency issues): 0300 123 1100 Access Point (Adult social care): 01273 295 555 Age Concern : https://www.ageuk.org.uk/westsussexbrightonhove or 01273 720 603 Report Anti-Social behaviour : https://www.brighton-hove.gov.uk/community-safety-partnership/anti-social-behaviour-asb-and-hate-incidents Crime Stoppers : 0800 555 111 Environmental services (Roads and pavements, waste collections, public toilets, street cleaning and environmental enforcement): 01273 29 29 29 General Money Guidance : https://www.moneyhelper.org.uk/en or 0800 138 7777 General Housing Advice : https://www.brighton-hove.gov.uk/housing Private Housing Advice : 01273 293 156 Council Housing Tenants : 01273 296 622 Noise Patrol : 01273 700812 Parking Permit Services : 01273 296 622 Pensions Guidance : http://moneyhelper.org.uk/en/pensions-and-retirement/pension-problems or 0800 011 3797 Rubbish, Recycling and Streets : https://www.brighton-hove.gov.uk/rubbish-recycling-and-streets Tax Credit Helpline : 0345 300 3900 Winter Fuel Payment Helpline : 0800 731 0160 If you do not have access to a phone, you can visit Customer Service Centres in Brighton (Jubilee Library), or Hove (Hove library) and use phones and computors there to contact council services. Further details Website promoted by Jane Gately on behalf of Peter Kyle both at 99 Church Road, Hove, BN3 2BA ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
